title: sorbus luristanica
intro: Sorbus luristanica, also known as the Luristan Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sorbus luristanica include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sorbus luristanica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health issues.
